validation_rules: reject Mathlib availability without a passing probe
reject tactic availability claims without probe receipts
reject premise rows that carry proof or oracle body fields
reject target-shape routes that admit unavailable tactics
reject provider recipes that exceed public byte budgets
reject provider recipes that allow proof bodies or provider payload bodies

emit a formal_math_readiness_extension_board with selected pattern ids, source intake ref, target refs, validation refs, premise namespace coverage, tactic availability coverage, routing admissibility, and authority ceiling
keep Lean/Lake execution unauthorized in this organ
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite the formal_math_readiness_extensions projection cell, selected pattern ids, fixture refs, generated extension board, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

allowed_public_inputs: tactic ids and probe receipt refs
premise ids, namespaces, retrieval terms, and split eligibility
target-shape route cases and admissible tactic ids
provider context recipe ids and byte budgets
forbidden_public_inputs: Mathlib availability claims without passing probe receipts

anti_claim: This standard governs public synthetic formal-math readiness metadata only; it does not authorize Lean/Lake execution, Mathlib-dependent proof work, provider calls, proof bodies, theorem correctness claims, or release/publication work.

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe readiness gate for Lean/Std premise availability, tactic availability, target-shape routing, and context-recipe constraints.
standard_payload.teleology: Turn the formal_math_readiness_extensions intake cell into a runnable boundary board future formal-math organs can inspect before proof or retrieval work.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning readiness metadata into theorem-proof authority.
failure_modes: provider context recipe smuggles proof body

omission_receipt.reason: public readiness gate carries metadata, synthetic fixtures, and receipt evidence only

anti_claim_contract.rule: formal readiness material must state that readiness is not proof authority

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata and public replacements stay public-root relative
